name: AI WordPress Blog Post Writer
description: Takes a set of keywords, Claude AI researches and writes a complete SEO-optimized blog post with title, meta description, structured content, tags, and categories, then publishes directly to WordPress.

source.originalName: Write a WordPress post with AI (starting from a few keywords)

wordpressKey.description: WordPress connection key for publishing posts

wordpressSite.description: WordPress site ID or domain (e.g. 'mysite.wordpress.com' or '82974409')

keywords.description: Comma-separated keywords to write about (e.g. 'AI automation, workflow, productivity')

steps.name: Build Claude prompt for blog post writing
Run Claude AI to write blog post
Parse Claude AI output and strip fences
